## htsjdk.samtools.metrics.StringHeader
# CollectInsertSizeMetrics --Histogram_FILE results/homo_sapiens/naiveB/naiveB/picard/hist/naiveB_S2R3_insert_size_histo.pdf --MINIMUM_PCT 0.05 --INPUT results/homo_sapiens/naiveB/naiveB/align/S2R3/naiveB_S2R3.bam --OUTPUT results/homo_sapiens/naiveB/naiveB/picard/insert/naiveB_S2R3_insert_size.txt --VERBOSITY WARNING --DEVIATIONS 10.0 --METRIC_ACCUMULATION_LEVEL ALL_READS --INCLUDE_DUPLICATES false --ASSUME_SORTED true --STOP_AFTER 0 --QUIET false --VALIDATION_STRINGENCY STRICT --COMPRESSION_LEVEL 5 --MAX_RECORDS_IN_RAM 500000 --CREATE_INDEX false --CREATE_MD5_FILE false --GA4GH_CLIENT_SECRETS client_secrets.json --help false --version false --showHidden false --USE_JDK_DEFLATER false --USE_JDK_INFLATER false
## htsjdk.samtools.metrics.StringHeader
# Started on: Mon Feb 09 16:21:14 CST 2026
